control_card.F: The scan estimates cocycle defects and floor proxies only; it does not prove a uniform lower bound.
control_card.G: No theorem, Clay, or route promotion is inferred from this scan.
control_card.L: Load raw frames, select dominant modes, form resonant triads, build an incidence operator, extract nullspace-style cycle directions, and emit floor-style telemetry.
control_card.O: Measure cocycle-frustration floor telemetry for the active NS triad Wall 1 route.
control_card.R: Construct finite resonant triad incidence carriers on small shells, identify low-frustration references, and summarize cycle-defect lower-bound proxies together with irreducible floor ratios.
control_card.S: Candidate-only telemetry; cycle-defect lower bounds and floor ratios are empirical and non-promoting.
